name: All Purpose Clear Expandable Bin Small - Brightroom™
description:
This Small All Purpose Clear Expandable Bin from Brightroom™ will keep your home organized and clutter-free. Featuring a clear hue, this storage bin lets you see the stored contents, while the expandable design provides extra space for storing large items. With cut-out handles for easy portability, this 256-cubic-inches bin is ideal for storing throws, pillows, and other frequently used items.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
